channel.title: Audio Plugin Guy - Deals Feed
channel.description: Las mejores ofertas de Audio Plugin Guy.

item.title: [HOT] Solid State Logic|Get 79% off SSL Native Vocalstrip 2 by Solid State Logic. The discounted price is $19.99.?NEW
